name: harness-agentic-spec
description: Local OpenSpec-style Java backend delivery harness with greenfield scaffolding, stage gates, Agent collaboration, hooks, and reusable templates.

interface.shortDescription: Spec-driven Java backend delivery with gates and Agent collaboration.
interface.longDescription: Provides local-spec-new, local-spec-bootstrap, and local-spec-dev skills, OpenSpec templates, session hooks, Java checks, and the harness-spec CLI for status, validation, gates, and Agent collaboration verification.
defaultPrompt: 检查当前 change 的质量门禁
